title: Hemionitis duthiei
taxonomy: Hemionitis duthiei belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, a group of ferns commonly known as the polypody ferns. This species is classified under the genus Hemionitis, which consists of several species of tropical ferns. Hemionitis duthiei is further categorized as a species of the genus Hemionitis, specifically Hemionitis duthiei. The classification of Hemionitis duthiei is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Polypodiaceae, genus Hemionitis, and species H. duthiei.
